The '''fatfish''' was a fish native to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was used in the traditional [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] dessert [[umi-yumi]]. It had a [[Sulfur/Legends|sulfurous]] flavor.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Fatfish appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
